buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.destructive: bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground hover:bg-destructive/90 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-all active:scale-95

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

universal_guidelines: Use 'Indian Rupee' formatting (₹1,00,000.00) strictly for all currency values.
Sidebar is DARK (#0F172A) with white text. Main content area is LIGHT (#F8FAFC).
Mobile navigation is a fixed BOTTOM TAB BAR (5 tabs).
Record Transaction screen uses a 2x3 or 3x2 grid of LARGE cards with icons.
Use 'Green' for Money In/Receivables, 'Red' for Money Out/Payables, 'Blue' for general balances.
Do NOT use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid colors or very subtle patterns.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover states and active states.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for large financial numbers to ensure readability.
Loading skeletons are mandatory for all async data.
instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'clsx' and 'tailwind-merge' if not present (utilize cn helper).
Set up the Tailwind config with the custom colors provided in 'colors.base' and 'colors.semantic'.
Create a 'Layout' component that handles the Sidebar (Desktop) and BottomNav (Mobile) logic.
Create a reusable 'MoneyCard' component for the dashboard summary.
Implement the 'RecordTransaction' grid as the central action hub.
